rag_rules: Use AGREE syntax: assume/guarantee labels, eq/const declarations, and assign statements
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not, =>
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope
Delete generated clauses if diagnostics report unresolved references to AADL properties or invalid AGREE types
Use AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use guarantee for output range constraints
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not invent declarations for unresolved identifiers; use existing visible identifiers
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
